exercises.name: Yoga - Dolphin Plank
exercises.description: Start in forearm plank position, keeping your body in a straight line, and engage the core and legs.

exercises.name: Yoga - Downward-Facing Dog (Adho Mukha Svanasana)
exercises.description: From all fours, lift your hips high, straighten your legs, and press your heels toward the floor while keeping your hands shoulder-width apart and feet hip-width apart.

exercises.name: Yoga - Eagle Pose (Garudasana)
exercises.description: Cross one leg over the other, wrapping the foot around the standing leg, and cross your arms in front, bringing palms together.

exercises.name: Yoga - Easy Pose (Sukhasana)
exercises.description: Sit with legs crossed, hands resting on your knees, and spine tall. Relax the shoulders and focus on steady breathing.

exercises.name: Yoga - Extended Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose
exercises.description: Stand on one leg, extend the other leg forward and hold the big toe with your hand while keeping your other arm extended out.

exercises.name: Yoga - Extended Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose, Open
exercises.description: From the Extended Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose, open your extended leg to the side, keeping the core engaged and balance steady.

exercises.name: Yoga - Extended Side Angle Pose (Utthita Parsvakonasana)
exercises.description: From Warrior II, bend the front knee and bring your forearm to your thigh or hand to the floor, extending the opposite arm overhead.

exercises.name: Yoga - Extended Side Plank
exercises.description: From a regular plank, rotate your body to one side and lift the top arm toward the ceiling, stacking your feet and keeping your body in a straight line.

exercises.name: Yoga - Fire Log Pose (Agnistambhasana)
exercises.description: Sit with one leg stacked over the other, keeping the knees aligned and the feet flexed. Fold forward for a deeper stretch.

exercises.name: Yoga - Forearm Stand (Pincha Mayurasana)
exercises.description: Start in Downward-Facing Dog, bring forearms to the ground, and lift your legs to the sky, keeping the core engaged and balance steady.

exercises.name: Yoga - Frog Pose (Mandukasana)
exercises.description: Start on all fours, widen your knees and keep your feet flexed, then lower your hips towards the floor, stretching the inner thighs and hips.

exercises.name: Yoga - Full Split
exercises.description: From Half Split, deepen the stretch by lowering the hips to the floor and extending both legs fully straight.

exercises.name: Yoga - Garland Pose (Malasana)
exercises.description: Squat deeply with feet wide apart, keeping your heels on the floor, and bring your palms together in front of your chest while pushing your elbows against your inner knees.

exercises.name: Yoga - Half Frog Pose (Ardha Bhekasana)
exercises.alternateName: deep hip flexor and quad stretch
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach, bend one knee, and bring the foot towards your glutes while reaching for the ankle with the opposite hand.

exercises.name: Yoga - Half Lord of the Fishes Pose (Ardha Matsyendrasana)
exercises.description: Sit with one leg bent in front of you and the other leg crossed over. Twist your torso toward the top leg while keeping the spine long.

exercises.name: Yoga - Half Moon Pose (Ardha Chandrasana)
exercises.description: From a standing position, shift weight onto one leg, extend the other leg parallel to the floor, and raise the opposite arm toward the ceiling.

exercises.name: Yoga - Half Split
exercises.description: From a lunge position, straighten the front leg and fold forward, keeping the hips squared and stretching the hamstrings.

exercises.name: Yoga - Happy Baby Pose (Ananda Balasana)
exercises.description: Lie on your back, grab the outsides of your feet, and pull your knees toward your armpits, keeping the feet flexed.

exercises.name: Yoga - Hero Pose (Virasana)
exercises.description: Sit with your knees bent, feet under your hips, and thighs on the floor. Keep your spine tall, resting your hands on your thighs.

exercises.name: Yoga - Hero Pose Reclining
exercises.description: From Hero Pose, slowly recline your torso back, bringing your hands behind you or using props for support.

exercises.name: Yoga - King Cobra Pose
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach, place your palms near your chest, and lift your torso while bending your elbows slightly, arching the back deeply.

exercises.name: Yoga - King Pigeon Pose (Eka Pada Rajakapotasana)
exercises.description: From Downward Dog, bring one knee toward your hands, extend the back leg, and lower your torso down, reaching arms overhead.

exercises.name: Yoga - Knee to Nose to Fallen Triangle
exercises.description: From Three-Legged Dog, bring your knee to your nose, then open your hips to fall into a side plank position, creating a Fallen Triangle.

exercises.name: Yoga - Lizard Pose (Utthan Pristhasana)
exercises.description: From Downward Dog, bring one foot forward between your hands, and lower your hips, keeping your back leg straight and hands on the floor or a block.

exercises.name: Yoga - Lizard Pose with Quad Stretch
exercises.alternateName: Hip opener with deep hip flexor stretch
exercises.description: From Lizard Pose, bend your back knee and reach for the foot with the opposite hand to stretch the quadriceps while deepening the hip stretch.

exercises.name: Yoga - Locust Pose (Salabhasana) A
exercises.description: Retrieving data. Wait a few seconds and try to cut or copy again.

exercises.name: Yoga - Locust Pose (Salabhasana) B
exercises.description: Lie face down, extend your arms back by your sides, and lift your chest and legs while keeping your legs straight and the feet flexed.

exercises.name: Yoga - Locust Pose Contemporary
exercises.description: Same as Locust Pose, but with hands clasped behind your back and shoulders pulling away from your ears as you lift the chest and legs.

exercises.name: Yoga - Lotus Pose (Padmasana)
exercises.description: Sit with legs crossed, placing each foot on the opposite thigh. Keep the spine tall and hands resting on your knees.

exercises.name: Yoga - Low Boat Pose (Ardha Navasana)
exercises.description: Lie on your back, lift your legs and torso off the floor, and balance on your sit bones while keeping your arms extended in front of you.

exercises.name: Yoga - Low Lunge to High Lunge Flow
exercises.description: From Downward Dog, step one foot forward into a low lunge, then transition into a High Lunge by lifting the back leg and raising arms overhead.

exercises.name: Yoga - Marichi’s Pose (Marichyasana)
exercises.description: Sit with one leg bent in front of you and the other leg extended. Twist your torso toward the bent leg, placing one hand on the floor behind you and the other holding the bent leg.

exercises.name: Yoga - Mountain Pose (Tadasana)
exercises.description: Stand tall with feet together, arms by your sides, and weight evenly distributed on both feet. Engage your thighs, lift your chest, and lengthen your spine.

exercises.name: Yoga - One-Legged Wheel Pose
exercises.description: Begin in Wheel Pose, then lift one leg off the floor, keeping your arms strong and engaged while supporting your balance.

exercises.name: Yoga - Pigeon Pose (Kapotasana)
exercises.description: From Downward Dog, bring one knee forward toward your hands, extend the back leg, and lower your torso toward the floor, keeping the back leg straight and the chest lifted.

exercises.name: Yoga - Plow Pose (Halasana)
exercises.description: From Shoulder Stand, lower your feet to the floor behind your head while keeping your legs straight and your arms extended on the floor.

exercises.name: Yoga - Press Handstand Split
exercises.description: From standing, hinge at your hips, press your hands into the floor, and slowly lift your legs into a split, aiming for balance in the handstand.

exercises.name: Yoga - Puppy Pose (Anahatasana)
exercises.description: Start in Child’s Pose, walk your hands forward, and lower your chest toward the floor, stretching the arms and chest deeply.

exercises.name: Yoga - Reclined Bound Angle Pose (Supta Baddha Konasana)
exercises.description: Lie on your back, bring the soles of your feet together, and allow your knees to fall outward, relaxing the hips and inner thighs.

exercises.name: Yoga - Reclining Toe Hold (Supta Padangusthasana)
exercises.description: Lie on your back, extend one leg toward the sky, and hold the big toe with your hand, keeping the other leg grounded on the floor.
